name: Standard Collection Flow
description: The default end-to-end collection sequence. Starts with a gentle reminder and escalates through email, SMS, and a payment check-in call — with a fresh Xero check before every action.

config.label: Friendly reminder email
config.subject: Friendly reminder — Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} is overdue
config.body:
Hi {{contactName}},

I hope this message finds you well.

Just a friendly reminder that Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}} was due on {{dueDate}} and remains outstanding.

If you've already arranged payment, please disregard this message. Otherwise, we'd appreciate you settling this at your earliest convenience, or reach out if you have any questions.

Kind regards,
{{senderName}}
{{companyName}}

config.label: Professional follow-up email
config.subject: Follow-up: Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} remains outstanding

config.label: SMS reminder
config.template: Hi {{contactName}}, a quick reminder about Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} ({{amount}}) which is now overdue. Please call us on 1300 XXX XXX or reply to arrange payment. — {{companyName}}

config.label: Payment check-in call
config.notes: Call to discuss payment. Note any promise-to-pay date. Assess if dispute review is needed. If no response within 3 days, escalate to senior accounts.

config.label: Needs review — Dispute or no response

name: Quick Email Sequence
description: A lightweight 2-touch email sequence for low-priority overdue invoices. Two emails with a 7-day gap. No SMS or call.

config.label: Send overdue notice
config.subject: Your account is overdue — Invoice {{invoiceNumber}}

config.label: Send SMS reminder
config.template: Hi {{contactName}}, this is a reminder about invoice {{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}}. Please call us on 1300 XXX XXX. — {{companyName}}

name: Escalation
description: Full escalation for invoices 30+ days overdue. Urgent email, SMS, then scheduled call. Use as a supplement when standard flow hasn't resolved the debt.

config.label: Send urgent notice
config.subject: URGENT: Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} requires immediate payment
config.body:
Dear {{contactName}},

Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} for {{amount}} is now significantly overdue (due {{dueDate}}).

Despite our previous reminders, payment has not been received. We require this matter to be resolved immediately.

Please arrange payment within 3 business days, or contact us urgently to discuss. Failure to respond may result in referral to our debt recovery team.

Regards,
{{senderName}}
{{companyName}}

config.label: Send urgent SMS
config.template: URGENT: Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} ({{amount}}) is significantly overdue. Contact us immediately: 1300 XXX XXX. — {{companyName}}

config.label: Schedule collection call
config.notes: Final call before referral to debt collection agency
